title: Biome Moss
description: Adds biome color variants for all moss.
body:
Adds biome color variants for all moss. This includes:
• Moss Block
• Moss Carpet
• Mossy Cobblestone
• Mossy Cobblestone Slab
• Mossy Cobblestone Stairs
• Mossy Cobblestone Wall
• Mossy Stone Bricks
• Mossy Stone Brick Slab
• Mossy Stone Brick Stairs
• Mossy Stone Brick Wall
• Infested Mossy Stone Bricks
